sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48203" key="qeo/kritos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θεό-κρῐτος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n48203.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">judge of gods</tr_>, of Paris, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0208.tlg001:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dosiad.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ara</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
